name: Tutti-Frutti Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan, combine cocoa powder, condensed milk, water, orange peel, corn syrup, granulated sugar, and brown sugar.
2. Place over medium heat and stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Clip on a candy thermometer and cook to 236°F (115°C) or soft-ball stage.
4. Remove from heat and allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm.
5. Meanwhile, butter a 9-inch square baking pan; set aside.
6. Add dates and nuts to the fudge and stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture thickens and begins to set up.
7. Scrape into the prepared pan.
8. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm. Cut into 1-inch squares.
9. Serve immediately, or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
